original: textify(Eb||(Eb=(0,Bt.Z)(["“Hm,” Narc blinks, her lips a flat line. “Very well then.” You watch her mill around for a few seconds, scooping up her bag and flattening her skirt. “I must return to my corner now. It is quite the competitive area, and should not be left empty for long. Be sure to drink plenty of fluids, and have a most pleasant day.” After giving you a small bow, she turns and leaves. You take a few moments to collect yourself, then decide what to do next."])))

A glint of something catches your eye nestled amongst your defeated assailants cleavage. One quick tug is all it takes to yank the thing free. You found a Gabilani Data Chip. Perhaps this is exactly the thing Narc was looking for?\n\n(Key Item Obtained: Gabilani Data Chip)
